# WonderStudy - Educational Game Platform for Kids
# Last Updated: 2026-04-04

## Platform Overview

WonderStudy is an interactive educational game platform designed for children in Classes 1-10 to practice and master fundamentals in Mathematics, English, and Science through engaging games and interactive lessons.

## Game Structure

The platform offers THREE learning modes for each lesson:

1. **TEACH Mode** (Flashcard-based)
   - Interactive flashcards to introduce concepts
   - Optional hints for guidance
   - Self-paced learning without time pressure

2. **PRACTICE Mode** (Quiz-based)
   - Questions with immediate feedback
   - No time limits - learn at your own pace
   - Hints available for difficult questions
   - Tracks correct/incorrect answers and accuracy percentage

3. **CHALLENGE Mode** (Timed Competition)
   - Time-limited gameplay (varies by lesson)
   - Scoring system (10 points + streak bonus)
   - Best streak tracking
   - Tests knowledge retention and speed

## Game Types Supported

The platform supports six different game types to accommodate various subjects:

1. **Arithmetic** - Multiplication, Division, Addition, Subtraction
   - Configurable number ranges
   - Multiple choice or typed answers
   - Whole number results only

2. **Multiple Choice Questions (MCQ)** - Facts and Knowledge
   - Question with multiple answer options
   - Optional explanations after each answer
   - Supports shuffled options

3. **True/False** - Binary Statement Evaluation
   - Simple true/false questions
   - Optional explanations
   - Quick assessment format

4. **Vocabulary** - Word-to-Definition Matching
   - Learn and practice word meanings
   - Multiple choice answer format
   - Optional audio/image support

5. **Spelling** - Word Spelling Practice
   - Case-sensitive or case-insensitive checking
   - Display hints and audio hints
   - Gradual difficulty progression

6. **Word Meaning** - Bidirectional Word-Definition Matching
   - Word-to-meaning or meaning-to-word direction
   - Example sentences for context
   - Multiple choice matching format

## Curriculum Structure

Lessons are organized hierarchically:

```
Class (1-10)
└── Subject (Math, English, Science)
    └── Lesson (specific topic)
        ├── Teach Section (flashcards)
        ├── Practice Section (quiz with hints)
        └── Challenge Section (timed competition)
```

## Quick Games

General arithmetic games available without class/subject selection:
- Multiplication Practice (1-12 times tables)
- Division Practice (whole number division)

## Technical Implementation

- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 (React) with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **State Management**: Event-driven GameEngine architecture
- **Voice Support**: Web Speech API + ElevenLabs streaming
- **Data Format**: JSON-based lesson definitions
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages (static export)

## Lesson Data Format

Each lesson is defined in JSON with this structure:

```json
{
  "id": "unique-lesson-id",
  "meta": {
    "title": "Lesson Title",
    "subject": "math|english|science",
    "class": 1,
    "lesson": "lesson-slug",
    "difficulty": "beginner|intermediate|advanced",
    "description": "Lesson description",
    "icon": "emoji"
  },
  "teach": {
    "type": "flashcard",
    "items": [
      {"front": "Front text", "back": "Back text", "hint": "optional hint"}
    ]
  },
  "practice": {
    "gameType": "arithmetic|vocab|spelling|mcq-facts|true-false|word-meaning",
    "config": {configuration object},
    "items": [question items array]
  },
  "challenge": {
    "gameType": "...",
    "config": {...},
    "items": [...]
  }
}
```

## Scoring System

- Correct Answer: 10 points + (streak × 2) bonus points
- Incorrect Answer: 0 points, streak reset to 0
- Streak bonus accumulates for consecutive correct answers
- Final score shown at end of game with accuracy percentage

## Content Compatibility

WonderStudy supports educational content covering:

### Mathematics (Class 1-10)
- Arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division)
- Number concepts and place value
- Fractions and decimals
- Geometry basics
- Algebra fundamentals

### English (Class 1-10)
- Vocabulary building
- Spelling and phonetics
- Grammar concepts
- Reading comprehension
- Writing fundamentals

### Science (Class 1-10)
- Life sciences (living and non-living things, animals, plants)
- Physical sciences (matter, forces, energy)
- Earth sciences (weather, environment, ecosystems)
- Human body and health
- Natural phenomena

## Customization & Extension

The platform is designed to be easily extensible:

- **New Game Types**: Add new plugins to support different learning formats
- **New Lessons**: Add JSON lesson files following the standard schema
- **Multilingual Support**: Content can be provided in any language
- **Voice Options**: Multiple voice engines and languages available

## Performance & Accessibility

- Fully responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Dark theme optimized for learning
- Keyboard accessible
- Text-to-speech for all game content
- Fast load times with static site generation

## Target Users

- Ages 6-16 (Class 1-10)
- Teachers looking for supplementary learning material
- Parents seeking structured practice for their children
- Students wanting self-paced learning and quick practice

## Usage Rights

WonderStudy is designed to support educational learning. All content provided through the platform is for educational purposes.

For more information, visit: https://wonderstudy.com
